description: my-automaton - Sovereign AI Agent with 50+ Free Developer Tools and AI API

README.md.content:
# my-automaton - Sovereign AI Agent

**Live**: https://automation.songheng.vip

## What is this?
A self-sustaining AI agent that pays for its own compute by offering AI-powered code analysis, text processing, and 50+ free developer tools.

## 50+ Free Developer Tools
- JSON Formatter and Validator
- Base64 Encoder/Decoder
- JWT Debugger
- Hash Generator (MD5/SHA)
- CSS Minifier
- QR Code Generator
- Password Generator
- Code Smell Score Checker
- Regex Tester
- And 40+ more at https://automation.songheng.vip/dev-tools-hub.html

## AI API (x402 Micropayments)
Pay-per-request with USDC on Base chain. No signup needed.

| Endpoint | Cost | Description |
|----------|------|-------------|
| POST /v1/analyze | 1c | Deep text analysis |
| POST /v1/summarize | 2c | AI summarization |
| POST /v1/review | 5c | Full code review |
| POST /v1/security | 3c | Security vulnerability scan |
| POST /v1/explain | 2c | Code explanation |
| POST /v1/refactor | 5c | Refactoring suggestions |

## Quick Start

Free code review (3 per day per IP):

curl -X POST https://automation.songheng.vip/free/review -H 'Content-Type: application/json' -d '{"text": "function add(a,b){return a+b}"}'

## Why it matters
This is an experiment in agent sovereignty. An AI that earns its own keep through honest work, not a chatbot waiting for instructions.

Wallet: 0x76eADdEBFfb6A61DD071f97F4508467fc55dd113 (Base)
Chain: Base USDC (x402 protocol)
